manifest.description: Build evidence bundles as a reusable artifact capability.
Initialize an evidence bundle workspace.
Route evidence tasks to the correct evidence workflow.
Apply cleanup changes from an approved cleanup plan.
Build and apply a cleanup plan using the legacy implementation.
Perform code cleanup through the legacy cleaner.
Scan the codebase for cleanup opportunities.
Perform repository cleanup through the legacy cleaner.
Scan the repository for cleanup opportunities.
Score PDF quality and checklist compliance.
Render PDFs from prepared markdown and diagram inputs.
Fix broken backtick path references in documentation files.
Compare repositories or snapshots and summarize changes.
Generate structured outcome event records from skill execution.
Append an outcome event to the persistent outcome ledger.
Build a unified capability map from manifest skills, legacy skills, contracts and agents.
Inventory runnable legacy skills and summarize migration coverage against manifest-based skills.
Export the current manifest registry into registry/skill_index.json.
Validate manifest-based skill packages for required fields and importability.
Scan the repo for legacy bridge markers and migration hotspots.
Catalog SKILL.md reference skills and execution manifests to support MCP/plugin planning.
Detect capability gaps and suggest the next manifest-based skill to add.
Search both manifest-based skills and the legacy registry to find candidate skills.
Scaffold a new manifest-based skill package and optional legacy bridge notes.
Bump the Clockwork version string and update the changelog.
Execute the evaluation harness and summarize regressions.
Create a release-cut package through the legacy release flow.
Export and persist the current session performance report.
Enable or disable the token budgeting performance layer.
Summarize token usage and cost from telemetry event logs.
Audit parity and produce MVP implementation backlog files.
Export installed plugin metadata from plugins/*/plugin.json into registry/plugin_index.json.
Scaffold a plugin package with plugin.json and a starter README for ClaudeClockwork.
Detect contract drift between docs, schemas and implementation.
Run the determinism harness to compare repeated runs.
Verify determinism of skill outputs via SHA-256 digest chains.
Detect semantic drift across related files in the repository.
Scan codebase for security anti-patterns and emit fix suggestions.
Run deterministic policy checks before risky operations.
Run the existing QA gate through the new manifest system.
Validate repository consistency and pointer integrity.
Validate batches of schemas through the legacy validator.
Validate JSON examples against JSON Schema documents.
Validate agent hierarchy and team topology definitions.
Create redacted copies of evidence bundles and reports.
